nasb.text: Now Adonijah the son of Haggith came to Bathsheba the mother of Solomon. And she said, “Do you come peacefully?” And he said, “Peacefully.”

esv.text: Then Adonijah the son of Haggith came to Bathsheba the mother of Solomon. And she said, “Do you come peacefully?” He said, “Peacefully.”

cnv.text: 哈及的兒子亞多尼雅去見所羅門的母親拔示巴，拔示巴問他：“你來是為和平嗎？”他回答：“是為和平來的。”

ccb.text: 一天，哈姬的儿子亚多尼雅来见所罗门的母亲拔示芭，拔示芭问他：“你是为平安而来吗？”亚多尼雅说：“是为平安而来。”
